Ask your question →
QUESTIONS

Questions & answers

01 What does Design Humanizer actually do?

It analyzes an AI-generated interface and shows what feels generic: weak hierarchy, repeated cards, unclear focus, poor spacing, and low visual priority. Then it suggests how to make the same content feel more intentional.

02 Is Design Humanizer a design generator?

Not exactly. It is closer to a design critique layer. It does not create a random new website from scratch; it helps improve the interface you already have.

03 Does it replace a designer?

No. It helps non-designers make better design decisions faster. A designer can still make deeper brand and product decisions.

04 Does it change my content?

No. The goal is to keep your original content and improve how it is presented visually.

05 What problems does it detect?

It detects weak hierarchy, repeated cards, unclear CTA focus, generic layout rhythm, poor grouping, spacing issues, and visual sameness.

06 Can I preview changes before applying them?

Yes. The goal is to show a clearer design direction before you change the actual page.

07 How does the Chrome extension work?

The extension runs directly on the current page, reads the visible layout, detects weak design patterns, and shows suggestions in a side panel.

08 What kinds of pages can it analyze?

Landing pages, MVP screens, dashboards, generated frontend pages, and product interfaces that run in the browser.

09 Is my page data stored?

For the MVP, Design Humanizer should avoid storing page content unless the user explicitly chooses to submit or save it.

10 Will it edit my code automatically?

The first version focuses on analysis and preview. Apply/copy features can be added later depending on the product roadmap.

11 When will it be available?

Design Humanizer is currently in development. Join the waitlist to get early access.

No questions in this category yet.

Design Humanizer

A Chrome extension for turning AI-generated interfaces into intentional product design.
